_comment_provider: One of: Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI, AzureOpenAI, Custom
_comment_apikey: DPAPI-encrypted at rest after first save. Do NOT paste a real key here — run option 99 (AI Assistant) inside the tool to configure interactively, or copy this file to ai_config.json and replace REPLACE_ME.
_comment_portable: ai_config.json is encrypted per-user and is NOT portable across machines or accounts.
